Localization.Description: Possible exploitation of the SambaCry vulnerability (CVE-2017-7494) for remote code execution

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Possible exploitation of the SambaCry vulnerability (CVE-2017-7494) for remote code execution by user {subject.account.name} on behalf of account {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host} is detected

Possible exploitation of the SambaCry vulnerability (CVE-2017-7494) for remote code execution by user {subject.account.name} on behalf of account {object.account.name} from host {dst.host} is detected on host {event_src.host}
